compiled_state.title: Wire check-shim-refs.sh into pre-commit hook
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Add pre-commit entry for check-shim-refs.sh. Filter: files matching plugins/dso/** excluding plugins/dso/scripts/**. Run with no args (default scan set).

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis GAP-2): Must update BOTH .pre-commit-config.yaml AND examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml with matching hook entries. validate.sh hook-drift check (line ~980) diffs these two files — if only one is updated, hook-drift FAIL.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — portability-check uses pre-commit-wrapper.sh with always_run:true and no file filter; check-shim-refs.sh accepts explicit file args; hook-drift checks all IDs from .pre-commit-config.yaml exist in example; portability-check is missing from example file
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: RED tests from 9584-87ba confirmed — test_validate_references_check_shim_refs in tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh is already GREEN (validate.sh already wires check-shim-refs.sh). No additional RED tests needed for pre-commit config wiring — this is config-only work, validated by hook-drift check in validate.sh.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — added shim-refs-check hook to .pre-commit-config.yaml (after portability-check, files: ^plugins/dso/, 5s timeout via pre-commit-wrapper.sh); added portability-check and shim-refs-check to examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml; both files pass yaml.safe_load validation
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: YAML validation passed ✓ — both files parse cleanly via python3 yaml.safe_load; hook-drift simulation PASS: all 9 hooks in .pre-commit-config.yaml present in examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml (shim-refs-check and portability-check both confirmed present)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All AC met: (1) shim-refs-check hook wired in .pre-commit-config.yaml with 5s timeout via pre-commit-wrapper.sh; (2) files: ^plugins/dso/ filter set (check-shim-refs.sh internally excludes plugins/dso/scripts/); (3) matching entry added to examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml; (4) portability-check added to example (was missing, flagged by hook-drift); (5) hook-drift simulation PASS; (6) both files valid YAML
comments.author: Test
